name: system_info
description: Retrieve system information from the host machine. Returns structured JSON data about the requested category: cpu, memory, disk, network, os, or all.

category.description: The category of system information to retrieve. 'cpu' for processor info, 'memory' for RAM usage, 'disk' for filesystem usage, 'network' for network interfaces, 'os' for OS/kernel info, 'all' for everything.
